\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3312 introduces Magnetic Helicity Evolution Evolution Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{d}{dt} \left( \mathcal{H}_M + \frac{ \lambda_g}{ \mu_0} \mathcal{H}_ \text{ac} \right) = 0 \end{equation}
